requirement_topic.en: Regulatory Scope: Which Lao Authority Governs PPE Respirator Market Entry?
requirement_topic.zh: 监管范围：哪个老挝机构管辖PPE呼吸器市场准入？
requirement_topic.zht: 監管範圍：哪個寮國機構管轄PPE呼吸器市場准入？

summary.en: In Laos, the Department of Standards and Metrology (DOSM) under the Ministry of Science and Technology (MoST) is the primary national standards and conformity body. DOSM administers mandatory conformity certification for regulated goods including personal protective equipment sold in the Lao market. The Ministry of Energy and Mines (MEM) and Electricite du Laos (EDL) apply their own procurement specifications for PPE used in energy and utility sector projects. Laos is a landlocked country and goods typically transit via Thailand or Vietnam — transit country customs and phytosanitary checks may apply at intermediate borders. Laos applies Lao National Standards (MS standards) which are often aligned with GOST or IEC references. There is no direct equivalent to the EU PPE Regulation 2016/425; the Lao framework is primarily conformity-certification-based rather than a detailed categorised PPE law.
summary.zh: 在老挝，隶属科技部（MoST）的标准计量局（DOSM）是主要的国家标准与合格评定机构。DOSM对进入老挝市场的受监管商品（包括个人防护装备）实施强制合格认证。能源矿产部（MEM）及老挝国家电力公司（EDL）对能源和公用事业项目所用PPE制定各自的采购规范。老挝是内陆国，货物通常经泰国或越南过境——中间边境可能适用过境国海关及植物检疫检查。老挝采用老挝国家标准（MS标准），通常与GOST或IEC参考标准一致。老挝没有与欧盟PPE法规2016/425直接对应的制度；老挝框架主要以合格认证为基础，而非详细分类的PPE法规。
summary.zht: 在寮國，隸屬科技部（MoST）的標準計量局（DOSM）是主要的國家標準與合格評定機構。DOSM對進入寮國市場的受監管商品（包括個人防護裝備）實施強制合格認證。能源礦產部（MEM）及寮國國家電力公司（EDL）對能源和公用事業項目所用PPE制定各自的採購規範。寮國是內陸國，貨物通常經泰國或越南過境——中間邊境可能適用過境國海關及植物檢疫檢查。寮國採用寮國國家標準（MS標準），通常與GOST或IEC參考標準一致。寮國沒有與歐盟PPE法規2016/425直接對應的制度；寮國框架主要以合格認證為基礎，而非詳細分類的PPE法規。

standards_or_laws: Law on Standards (Laos) — governs DOSM mandatory conformity certification
DOSM — Department of Standards and Metrology, Ministry of Science and Technology, Laos
MEM — Ministry of Energy and Mines (Laos) — sector-specific PPE procurement specs
EDL — Electricite du Laos — utility-sector PPE procurement requirements

summary.en: China's regulatory framework for PPE respirators is administered by SAMR (State Administration for Market Regulation) for industrial/non-medical masks under GB 2626-2019 (mandatory CCC), and by NMPA (National Medical Products Administration) for medical-grade masks under GB 19083-2010 and YY 0469-2011. The three-track system (industrial / medical-protective / surgical) provides a structured framework that does not map 1:1 to Laos's conformity-certification approach, but the GB 2626 KN95 certification baseline is commonly referenced in Lao procurement contexts.
summary.zh: 中国的PPE呼吸器监管框架由市场监督管理总局（SAMR）负责管理工业/非医用口罩（GB 2626-2019，强制CCC认证），国家药品监督管理局（NMPA）负责医疗级口罩（GB 19083-2010和YY 0469-2011）。三轨体系（工业/医用防护/外科）提供了结构化框架，与老挝的合格认证方式不能一一对应，但在老挝采购环境中，GB 2626 KN95认证基准通常被作为参考依据。
summary.zht: 中國的PPE呼吸器監管框架由市場監督管理總局（SAMR）負責管理工業/非醫用口罩（GB 2626-2019，強制CCC認證），國家藥品監督管理局（NMPA）負責醫療級口罩（GB 19083-2010和YY 0469-2011）。三軌體系（工業/醫用防護/外科）提供了結構化框架，與寮國的合格認證方式不能一一對應，但在寮國採購環境中，GB 2626 KN95認證基準通常被作為參考依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 2626-2019 — Non-powered air-purifying particle respirator (KN95) — SAMR / mandatory CCC
GB 2890-2009 — Respiratory protective equipment — Self-contained open-circuit compressed air breathing apparatus
GB 19083-2010 — Technical requirements for medical protective mask — NMPA Class II
YY 0469-2011 — Medical surgical mask — Technical requirements — NMPA Class II

gap.en: Laos does not have a PPE-specific regulation equivalent to EU Regulation 2016/425. Market entry is governed by DOSM mandatory conformity certification under the general Law on Standards. MEM and EDL may impose additional procurement specifications for sector use. Chinese GB 2626 KN95 test reports are a useful reference but do not automatically satisfy DOSM certification — exporters must confirm the current DOSM list of regulated goods and the applicable certification procedure. Transit via Thailand or Vietnam adds intermediate customs steps not present in direct-shipment markets.
gap.zh: 老挝没有与欧盟法规2016/425相当的PPE专项法规。市场准入依据《标准法》由DOSM实施强制合格认证。能源矿产部和老挝国家电力公司可能对行业用PPE附加采购规范。中国GB 2626 KN95检测报告可作为有用参考，但不能自动满足DOSM认证要求——出口商须确认当前DOSM受监管商品清单及适用认证程序。经泰国或越南过境增加了直运市场所没有的中间海关环节。
gap.zht: 寮國沒有與歐盟法規2016/425相當的PPE專項法規。市場准入依據《標準法》由DOSM實施強制合格認證。能源礦產部和寮國國家電力公司可能對行業用PPE附加採購規範。中國GB 2626 KN95檢測報告可作為有用參考，但不能自動滿足DOSM認證要求——出口商須確認當前DOSM受監管商品清單及適用認證程序。經泰國或越南過境增加了直運市場所沒有的中間海關環節。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DOSM conformity certification required for regulated goods entering the Lao market; MEM/EDL sector specs apply additionally for energy/utility procurement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 2626-2019 CCC certification required for industrial particle respirators sold in China; GB 19083 / YY 0469 for medical-grade under NMPA

source.publisher: Department of Standards and Metrology (DOSM), Ministry of Science and Technology, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Laos requires DOSM mandatory conformity certification for regulated PPE respirators entering the market. Chinese GB 2626 KN95 test reports are a reference baseline but do not substitute for DOSM certification. Exporters must verify the current regulated-goods list and applicable certification pathway with DOSM directly before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 老挝要求进入市场的受监管PPE呼吸器取得DOSM强制合格认证。中国GB 2626 KN95检测报告可作为参考基准，但不能替代DOSM认证。出口商在出货前须直接向DOSM核实当前受监管商品清单及适用认证路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 寮國要求進入市場的受監管PPE呼吸器取得DOSM強制合格認證。中國GB 2626 KN95檢測報告可作為參考基準，但不能替代DOSM認證。出口商在出貨前須直接向DOSM核實當前受監管商品清單及適用認證路徑。
